headline: Citigroup (C) Could Surpass Long-Term Profitability Target, According to Wells Fargo
summary: Citigroup Inc. (NYSE:C) is included among the Top 12 Dividend Stocks to Buy According to Billionaire Cliff Asness. On June 18, Wells Fargo raised its price recommendation on Citigroup Inc. (NYSE:C) to $165 from $162. It reiterated an Overweight rating on the shares. The firm believes Citi is positioned to exceed its 2026 return on […]

headline: Chinese Stocks in Hong Kong Rebound From Edge of Bear Market

headline: Aluminum’s War Shock Blunted by Dark Transits and Chinese Supply
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The Iran war caused one of the biggest supply shocks to ever hit the aluminum market, but the runaway price surge that many were bracing for has been blunted by the ingenuity of producers from the Middle East to China.
